{
  "claims": [
    "The legislation reduces administrative barriers to healthcare access by giving equal legal weight to electronic signatures.",
    "The bill ensures patients receive prompt care without compromising their security or delaying access to healthcare.",
    "Telehealth created an invaluable link for many to timely access healthcare during the pandemic.",
    "Telehealth use among Medicaid beneficiaries increased fifteenfold in 2021.",
    "Requiring physical signatures on medical release forms has created a new and unnecessary barrier to accessing healthcare."
